results.name: cycle-lea-circle-protection
results.description: Cycle that began in Alpha and concluded in Beta

results.name: cycle-lea-red-escalate
results.description: An early vertical cycle, three red creatures with the same P/T and mana cost, but with escalating abilities as rarity increases.

results.name: cycle-lea-slush-art
results.description: These cards were designed last-minute for Alpha and not playtested, and designed to use up leftover art. Read more here: [Alpha Top-Down cards  by WotC](https://magic.wizards.com/en/articles/archive/alpha-top-down-cards-2003-06-13)

results.name: cycle-lrw-lorwyn-five
results.description: “Lorwyn Five” is a nickname for the five original planeswalker cards that debuted in Lorwyn.
